hero.title: About Curio
hero.subtitle: A modern platform where ideas come to life through the power of words

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Curio is dedicated to empowering writers and connecting them with engaged readers. We believe that everyone has a story to tell, and we're here to provide the platform and tools to share those stories with the world.
mission.paragraph2: Whether you're an experienced author or just starting your writing journey, Curio offers a welcoming space to express yourself, engage with a community of like-minded individuals, and grow your audience.

features.subtitle: Discover the features that make Curio the perfect platform for writers and readers

community.title: Community First
community.description: We believe in fostering a supportive community where everyone can share their voice and grow together.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve our platform with the latest technologies to provide the best writing and reading experience.

quality.title: Quality Over Quantity
quality.description: We prioritize meaningful, well-crafted content that educates, inspires, and entertains our readers.

q1.question: How do I start writing on Curio?
q1.answer: Simply create an account, and you'll have access to our powerful editor to start writing and publishing your articles immediately.

q2.question: Is Curio free to use?
q2.answer: Yes! Curio is free for all writers and readers. We believe in making quality content accessible to everyone.

q3.question: How can I report inappropriate content?
q3.answer: Each article and comment has a report button. Click it to submit a report, and our team will review it promptly.

q4.question: Can I customize my author profile?
q4.answer: Absolutely! You can upload a profile picture, write a bio, and customize your profile to showcase your work.
